Combining momentum indicators EMA and Aroon with volatility-based risk management using ATR along with trend strength analysis via ADX, Bollinger bands, and identifying zones of converging/diverging momentum to identify potential trade entry points.
The combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR helps to identify potential trend reversals in the market.
